final_choice.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year

variables.notes: R:c. STD is ambiguous because current interest-bearing liabilities are split and the sheet has duplicate 'Loans from financial institutions' labels for non-current and current sections. I excluded lease rows per instruction. Chosen rows capture explicit current debt and short-term paper, but manual review is warranted to confirm whether current bank loans/hire purchase debt are already embedded in 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' or should be added separately.
No clear taxes payable/current tax liability row appears on the provided balance sheet preview.
